metadata.description: Arbitrary tone curve mapping - custom implementation

summary: Maps colors through an arbitrary curve (like Photoshop curves). Requires custom function to evaluate curve points.

implementation.approach_1: Store control points and interpolate between them
implementation.approach_2: Use Remap node for approximation (linear segments)

curve_evaluation: For each control point, interpolate based on input value
complexity: Depends on number of control points - 2 points is trivial (Lerp), 5+ requires spline math
compatibility_loss_50_percent: Accurate spline curve evaluation is complex; linear approximations used instead
